summary: Cover page for Financial Report Package for Briarwyck Owners Association, Inc. dated February 2026, prepared by PMI Cross Timbers with CINCSystems copyright notice
Balance sheet for Briarwyck Owners Association showing assets, liabilities, and equity with operating and reserve fund breakdowns as of 02/28/2026
Bank account list for Briarwyck Owners Association showing two SouthState Bank accounts (Operating and Reserve) with balances totaling $127,104.83 as of 2/28/2026

Income Statement - Operating for Briarwyck Owners Association, Inc. covering February 2026, showing operating income from assessments and other sources, plus operating expenses including administrative costs
Operating income statement for Briarwyck Owners Association showing building maintenance/repair expenses, reserve contributions, and net income for February 2026 with budget comparisons

Reserve Income Statement for Briarwyck Owners Association showing reserve income and expenses for February 2026, including bank interest, reserve contributions, and reserve expenses for common area and landscaping improvements

Invoice list for Briarwyck Owners Association showing paid invoices from 2/1/2026 - 2/28/2026, including vendors like Ambit Texas (electricity), AmTrust Financial (insurance), City of Carrollton (water/sewer), Five Star Aquatics (lake management), and Granite Landscape (grounds maintenance)
Invoice list for Briarwyck Owners Association showing paid invoices from 2/1/2026 - 2/28/2026, including management fees, utilities, and administrative expenses with payment details

Homeowner Aging Report for Briarwyck Owners Association showing delinquent accounts with aging buckets (Current, Over 30, Over 60, Over 90) for three homeowners: Jose Enrique Angulo, Stephan Daniels, and Laura Barrett, all in Step 4 collections status
Homeowner Aging Report for Briarwyck Owners Association showing delinquent accounts with aging buckets (Current, Over 30, Over 60, Over 90) and collection status for various homeowners
